title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCXCIII. Lullabies.
content:
Hush-a-bye, a ba lamb,
            Hush-a-bye a milk cow,
        You shall have a little stick
            To beat the naughty bow-wow.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. CCCXCIII. Lullabies."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
